description: Threshold contract for regression_pack_problem.csv — hard scene mini-gate.
note: More lenient than main gate defaults. These are aspirational targets for known-hard clips after AP-018..020 hardening.

rationale.max_id_changes_per_min: 25 vs default 8: night_ground_large_drones is a known-hard clip; target is below 25 after hardening
rationale.max_false_lock_rate: 0.55 vs default 0.35: large-drone night clips have inherently higher false_lock; tightened from 0.65 after AP-022 lock_tracker_min_score (0.42→0.52) improvement
rationale.max_noise_false_lock_rate: 0.35 vs default 0.18: noise clips without GT have structurally high false_lock; tightened from 0.40 after AP-021 track_state_acquire_frames hardening
rationale.min_continuity: 0.30 vs default 0.45: hard clips may have fragmented tracks
rationale.min_presence: 0.05 vs default 0.08: noise/background clips have near-zero real presence
rationale.max_night_id_changes_per_min: 18 vs default 8: night_ground_large_drones target after AP-022 stage-4b; explicit night gate separate from noise and ir/day
